custom_columns.label: Row Style
custom_columns.expr: "{'background-color':'#ef9a9a'}" if sys_uptime_days in[">180"] else "{'background-color':'#fff59d'}" if sys_uptime_days  in["150-180"] else "{'background-color':'#a5d6a7'}" if sys_uptime_days  in["<150"] else  "{'background-color':'#b0bec5'}"

custom_columns.label: Row Style
custom_columns.expr: "{'background-color':'#ef9a9a'}" if up_ports_categorization in["0"] else "{'background-color':'#fff59d'}" if up_ports_categorization  in["1-5"] else "{'background-color':'#a5d6a7'}" if up_ports_categorization  in["6+"] else  "{'background-color':'#b0bec5'}"

custom_columns.label: Row Style
custom_columns.expr: "{'background-color':'#ef9a9a'}" if down_ports_categorization in["0-3"] else "{'background-color':'#fff59d'}" if down_ports_categorization  in["4-8"] else "{'background-color':'#a5d6a7'}" if down_ports_categorization  in["9+"] else  "{'background-color':'#b0bec5'}"

widgets.title: Admin Down Ports by Product ID
Assets Expiring in 8 Quarters
widgets.extra_filter: (asset_object in ['Chassis', 'MODULE', 'FAN', 'POWERSUPPLY']) and (hw_status in 'Expiring in 8 Quarters') or (sw_status in 'Expiring in 8 Quarters')

widgets.title: Assets Expiring after 8 Quarters
widgets.extra_filter: (asset_object in ['Chassis', 'MODULE', 'FAN', 'POWERSUPPLY']) and (hw_status in 'Expiring after 8 Quarters') or (sw_status in 'Expiring after 8 Quarters')
